name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How this bot works:

• Tap 📋 Watchlist to add or remove coins
• Tap 💰 Price to check current prices
• Tap ⚙️ Settings to set quiet hours, timezone, and cooldowns
• Tap 📊 Summary to see your daily digest

Everything is just a tap away — no commands to remember.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
